---
title: Brand 1
engine: knitr
brand:
  color:
    palette:
      anchor-blue: "#2f5d8a"
      harbour-teal: "#2d8c8f"
      strait-violet: "#5f6fb3"
      slate-indigo: "#4b5c7a"
      horizon-cyan: "#3fa7d6"
    background:
      dark: "#161b22"
      light: "#f8fafc"
    foreground:
      dark: "#74aadb"
      light: "#4f789e"
    dark:
      dark: "#161b22"
      light: "#4f789e"
    light:
      dark: "#74aadb"
      light: "#f8fafc"
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Chakra Petch
        source: bunny
      - family: JetBrains Mono
        source: bunny
      - family: Great Vibes
        source: bunny
    base: Chakra Petch
    headings: Great Vibes
    monospace: JetBrains Mono
---

{{< include /brands/_r.qmd >}}
